presidentHistory.name: Droupadi Murmu
presidentHistory.bio: Current President of India. First tribal woman President; known for education, tribal welfare, and social service.

presidentHistory.name: Ram Nath Kovind
presidentHistory.bio: Served as President of India from 2017 to 2022.

presidentHistory.name: Pranab Mukherjee
presidentHistory.bio: Served as President of India from 2012 to 2017.

presidentHistory.name: Pratibha Patil
presidentHistory.bio: Served as President of India from 2007 to 2012. First woman to hold the office

presidentHistory.name: A. P. J. Abdul Kalam
presidentHistory.bio: Served as President of India from 2002 to 2007. Known as the Missile Man of India for his work in aerospace and defense.
presidentHistory.image: I Love India/src/assets/A. P. J. Abdul Kalam.jpg

presidentHistory.name: K. R. Narayanan
presidentHistory.bio: Served as President of India from 1997 to 2002. First Dalit President of India.

presidentHistory.name: Shankar Dayal Sharma
presidentHistory.bio: Served as President of India from 1992 to 1997.

presidentHistory.name: Ramaswamy Venkataraman
presidentHistory.bio: Served as President of India from 1987 to 1992.

presidentHistory.name: Giani Zail Singh
presidentHistory.bio: Served as President of India from 1982 to 1987.

presidentHistory.name: Neelam Sanjiva Reddy
presidentHistory.bio: Served as President of India from 1977 to 1982.

presidentHistory.name: Fakhruddin Ali Ahmed
presidentHistory.bio: Served as President of India from 1974 to 1977.

presidentHistory.name: V. V. Giri
presidentHistory.bio: Served as President of India from 1969 to 1974.

presidentHistory.name: Zakir Husain
presidentHistory.bio: Served as President of India from 1967 to 1969.

presidentHistory.name: Sarvepalli Radhakrishnan
presidentHistory.bio: Served as President of India from 1962 to 1967. Renowned philosopher and statesman.

presidentHistory.name: Rajendra Prasad
presidentHistory.bio: First President of India, serving from 1950 to 1962. Key figure in the Indian independence movement.

primeMinisterHistory.name: Narendra Damodardas Modi
primeMinisterHistory.bio: Current Prime Minister of India. Known for initiatives such as Digital India, Make in India, and Swachh Bharat Abhiyan.

primeMinisterHistory.name: Manmohan Singh
primeMinisterHistory.bio: Served as Prime Minister from 2004 to 2014.

primeMinisterHistory.name: Atal Bihari Vajpayee
primeMinisterHistory.bio: Served as Prime Minister of India, including terms in 1998 and 1999-2004.

primeMinisterHistory.name: H. D. Deve Gowda
primeMinisterHistory.bio: Served as Prime Minister of India from 1996 to 1997.
primeMinisterHistory.image: I Love India/H. D. Deve Gowda.jpg

primeMinisterHistory.name: P. V. Narasimha Rao
primeMinisterHistory.bio: Served as Prime Minister of India from 1991 to 1996. Known for economic liberalization reforms.
primeMinisterHistory.image: I Love India/P. V. Narasimha Rao.jpg

primeMinisterHistory.name: Chandra Shekhar
primeMinisterHistory.bio: Served as Prime Minister of India from 1990 to 1991.

primeMinisterHistory.name: Vishwanath Pratap Singh
primeMinisterHistory.bio: Served as Prime Minister of India from 1989 to 1990.

primeMinisterHistory.name: Rajiv Gandhi
primeMinisterHistory.bio: Served as Prime Minister of India from 1984 to 1989. Youngest Prime Minister in Indian history.

primeMinisterHistory.name: Indira Gandhi
primeMinisterHistory.bio: Served as Prime Minister of India from 1966 to 1977 and again from 1980 to 1984. First and only woman Prime Minister of India.

primeMinisterHistory.name: Lal Bahadur Shastri
primeMinisterHistory.bio: Served as Prime Minister of India from 1964 to 1966. Known for promoting the slogan 'Jai Jawan Jai Kisan' (Hail the soldier, Hail the farmer).

primeMinisterHistory.name: Jawaharlal Nehru
primeMinisterHistory.bio: First Prime Minister of India, serving from 1947 to 1964. Key figure in the Indian independence movement and architect of modern India.

homeMinisterHistory.name: Amit Shah
homeMinisterHistory.bio: Current Home Minister of India. Focused on national security, internal administration, and reforms.

homeMinisterHistory.name: Rajnath Singh
homeMinisterHistory.bio: Served as Home Minister from 2014 to 2019.

homeMinisterHistory.name: Sushilkumar Shinde
homeMinisterHistory.bio: Served as Home Minister from 2012 to 2014.

homeMinisterHistory.name: P. Chidambaram
homeMinisterHistory.bio: Served as Home Minister from 2008 to 2012.

homeMinisterHistory.name: Shivraj Patil
homeMinisterHistory.bio: Served as Home Minister from 2004 to 2008.

homeMinisterHistory.name: L. K. Advani
homeMinisterHistory.bio: Served as Home Minister from 1998 to 2004.

homeMinisterHistory.name: S. B. Chavan
homeMinisterHistory.bio: Served as Home Minister from 1986 to 1989 and again from 1991 to 1992.

homeMinisterHistory.name: P. V. Narasimha Rao
homeMinisterHistory.bio: Served as Home Minister from 1984 to 1986.

homeMinisterHistory.name: R. K. Shastri
homeMinisterHistory.bio: Served as Home Minister from 1963 to 1966.

homeMinisterHistory.name: Gulzarilal Nanda
homeMinisterHistory.bio: Served as Home Minister from 1962 to 1963 and again from 1966 to 1967.

homeMinisterHistory.name: Lal Bahadur Shastri
homeMinisterHistory.bio: Served as Home Minister from 1961 to 1962.

homeMinisterHistory.name: Jawaharlal Nehru
homeMinisterHistory.bio: Served as Home Minister from 1947 to 1961.

homeMinisterHistory.name: Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel
homeMinisterHistory.bio: First Home Minister of independent India, serving in 1947. Key figure in the integration of princely states into the Indian Union.

homeMinisterHistory.name: Baldev Singh
homeMinisterHistory.bio: Served as interim Home Minister in 1947 during the transition to independence.

homeMinisterHistory.name: K. Kamaraj
homeMinisterHistory.bio: Served as interim Home Minister in 1963 during a period of political transition.

homeMinisterHistory.name: G. K. Moopanar
homeMinisterHistory.bio: Served as interim Home Minister in 1991 during a period of political transition.

homeMinisterHistory.name: Chandra Shekhar
homeMinisterHistory.bio: Served as interim Home Minister in 1990 during a period of political transition.

homeMinisterHistory.name: Vishwanath Pratap Singh
homeMinisterHistory.bio: Served as interim Home Minister in 1989 during a period of political transition.

homeMinisterHistory.name: P. V. Narasimha Rao
homeMinisterHistory.bio: Served as interim Home Minister in 1984 during a period of political transition.

homeMinisterHistory.name: S. B. Chavan
homeMinisterHistory.bio: Served as interim Home Minister in 1980 during a period of political transition.

homeMinisterHistory.name: Yashwantrao Chavan
homeMinisterHistory.bio: Served as interim Home Minister in 1977 during a period of political transition.

homeMinisterHistory.name: Charan Singh
homeMinisterHistory.bio: Served as interim Home Minister in 1979 during a period of political transition.

homeMinisterHistory.name: Morarji Desai
homeMinisterHistory.bio: Served as Home Minister from 1977 to 1979. Later became Prime Minister of India.
